name: KOP Collection Services
description_short: Chicago-based commercial and consumer debt collection agency specializing in account recovery for businesses of all sizes, nationally and internationally.
description_long:
KOP Collection Services is a debt collection agency headquartered in the Chicago metropolitan area that has built its practice on foundations of quality assurance, ethics, integrity, and performance. The company serves both commercial and consumer debt collection needs, positioning itself as a personalized alternative to larger national collection agencies. CEO Aaron Koppel holds industry certifications including IACC (International Association of Commercial Collectors) Certified Commercial Collector and ACA (Association of Credit and Collection Professionals) International Professional Collection Specialist Certificate, demonstrating commitment to compliance and professional standards.

KOP offers customized debt collection services for businesses seeking to recover unpaid accounts while protecting their reputation as creditors. The company places emphasis on communication quality and legal compliance in their collection practices. They accept new claims for collection, provide free consultations, and tailor their approach to individual client needs. The agency serves clients ranging from small practices (dental offices, medical offices) to larger commercial accounts, handling both national and international collections.

The company differentiates itself through personalized service, emphasizing that they provide attention that larger agencies may not offer. Client testimonials highlight successful large-account recoveries (citing a $100K collection) and describe their customer service as superior to competitors. The CEO's dual professional certifications and emphasis on training in communication and regulatory compliance position the company as focused on ethical collection practices rather than aggressive tactics.

As a debt collection agency, KOP represents creditors seeking to recover debts, not consumers seeking debt relief. While categorized under debt-relief, consumers should understand this company collects debts on behalf of businesses—it does not settle, consolidate, or reduce consumer debt obligations. Consumers contacted by KOP would be debtors, not clients receiving assistance.
pros: CEO holds IACC Certified Commercial Collector and ACA International Professional Collection Specialist certifications
Documented success with large accounts (testimonial references $100K collection)
Explicitly emphasizes ethics, integrity, and quality assurance as company foundation
Serves both small and large clients with customized approaches
Operates nationally and internationally, not limited to local markets
Positive testimonials specifically mention customer service quality
cons: This is a debt collection agency collecting on behalf of creditors, not a debt relief service helping consumers reduce debt
Limited transparency on website regarding collection methods, success rates, or industry compliance records
No information provided about consumer rights protections or dispute resolution processes
Minimal online presence beyond basic website; no third-party review platforms or regulatory filing information visible
Website does not address Fair Debt Collection Practices Act (FDCPA) compliance or consumer protections
best_for: Small to mid-sized businesses with unpaid B2B accounts seeking professional collection services
Medical and dental practices with high volumes of patient billing disputes
Companies seeking personalized collection service as alternative to large national agencies
diagnosis: KOP Collection Services is a B2B debt collection agency, not a consumer debt relief company. Businesses owed money use KOP to recover unpaid accounts; consumers would only interact with them as debtors being collected upon. The miscategorization as 'debt-relief' is inaccurate—this company does not help consumers reduce, settle, or manage debt obligations.
services: Payment processing (bill payment option on website)
